raw_consumer_statement:
We are XXXX professionals who also invest in real estate. XXXX of our properties in XXXX XXXX needed renovations, and we contracted with a team from XXXX, where we also have properties, to travel and provide those renovations. The renovations were performed from apx XX/XX/XXXX - XX/XX/XXXX with very poor, substandard workmanship, as well as violating several terms of the renovation contracts. The XXXX admitted fault, as well as poor supervision of his team, but was unwilling to fix or reverse the appropriate amount of charges ( {$7500.00} ) so we could remediate with another team. 

We filed a dispute with Citibank for XXXX charges totaling {$7500.00} shortly after the work was completed, after inspecting the work during XX/XX/XXXX with a reputable property management company, and reaching out to the XXXX for resolution as discussed above. Citibank was provided with a detailed timeline, contracts, photo and video evidence of the deficient workmanship, and an affidavit by the property management company confirming their findings in support of our claim. 

Over the next several months, Citibank sent us multiple emails asking us the same basic questions which we answered over and over again. The denied the claim once, we called and asked why to which they had no answer, so we reopened and again provided all the info they asked. We asked if the XXXX had disputed or provided any rebuttal at any time, the answer was no. 

We spoke XXXX times ( dates, times, and individuals available if needed ) to dispute XXXX, XXXX, etc... but seemed to get nowhere, they said they were in an " arbitration process '' with XXXX but would not elaborate. Eventually, the claim was denied XX/XX/XXXX on the grounds that it " timed out. '' A call to a XXXX XXXX XXXX resulted in the explanation that his team doesn't understand construction/renovation, and there was nothing more they could do. 

I asked to speak to his XXXX, which was denied. I asked that they reverse the charges given that we had fulfilled our part of proving " services not rendered as promised, '' as detailed in the cardmember agreement and dispute process. He said all they could offer us was {$250.00}.
